steps: File tax reclaim with Citigroup Australia for BHP Group Ltd dividend, citing AU-NO treaty rate of 15% vs 25% withheld
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty benefit claim form to support AUD 138,750 recovery
Reference ISIN AU000000BHP4 and account 1301234567 in all correspondence with specific dividend payment date
Follow up within 30 days if no acknowledgment received from custodian's tax reclaim department
